creator: intron@intron.ac
text:
The port multimedia/linux-realplayer needs to install locale files to correct places so that GNU gettext can take effects.

Fix: 

Patch:     http://ftp.intron.ac/tmp/linux-realplayer.diff

Limited by my linguistic ability, I cannot verify all languages supported
by RealPlayer.

Screenshots of Testing:

Chinese:   http://ftp.intron.ac/tmp/realplayer_chinese.png
Deutsch:   http://ftp.intron.ac/tmp/realplayer_deutsch.png
French:    http://ftp.intron.ac/tmp/realplayer_french.png
Nipponese: http://ftp.intron.ac/tmp/realplayer_nipponese.png
Spanish:   http://ftp.intron.ac/tmp/realplayer_spanish.png
